intro.p1: These guides sit under the {{brand}} Logistics pillar. Each one covers the import mechanics for one destination market — HS classification, the duty and tax stack, customs clearance, and the document pack we supply.

listIntro: We ship UN 1361 coconut charcoal worldwide. These guides cover the markets buyers ask about most; tell us your destination if it is not listed and we will confirm the import requirements.
